title: 4x4 Piston Door
description: A flush 4x4 redstone door made of 8 sticky pistons (4 on each side). Each side has 4 sticky pistons stacked 2-high and 2-wide, all facing inward. The door blocks (any opaque block) fill the 4-wide, 4-tall opening when extended. When the piston retract, the opening clears. Triggered by a T flip-flop and a lever or pressure plate on both faces, wired symmetrically. Requires hidden wiring behind the walls. 4-wide doors need piston extenders on some rows to maintain flush appearance with the wall.
